texto: Much of what we think of as human evolved long after the use of tools. It is probably more correct to think of much of our structure as the result of culture than it is to think of men anatomically like ourselves slowly developing culture.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sherwood L. Washburn: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Much of what we think of as human evolved long after the use of tools. It is probably more correc…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, evolution, think pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
